stemHtml:
A cargo airline is contracted to carry construction materials. A beam measuring 8 feet in length, with a constant density, is placed on supports with a total weight of 40 kg. The running loads for the sections of the hold where the beam will be placed are as follows:

500–560 inches aft (5 feet): 5 kg per inch
561–578 inches aft (1.5 feet): 10 kg per inch
579–599 inches aft (20 inches): 3 kg per inch

What is the maximum weight of the beam, considering the given specifications?
